description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure dressed in athletic wear, featuring a sleeveless top with a V-neck and fitted athletic pants with accent bands at the calves and waist. The figure has a slim build and stands with arms extended horizontally, suggesting a neutral or T-pose. Her footwear consists of low-profile athletic sneakers, and she wears no visible accessories or carried items. The hairstyle is a medium-length ponytail, neatly tied at the back of the head. The facial features are simplified, with large eyes and a small nose, typical of stylized or cartoon-like characters. The overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for urban or active environments.
description: A stylized adult female in athletic wear with a ponytail, standing in a T-pose and wearing fitted pants and sneakers. The figure has a slim build and a modern, active appearance.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the V-neck sleeveless top, fitted pants, and ponytail; both arms and facial features are visible.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the athletic top, pants, and sneakers, with the face and chest more directly visible.
description_view_2: Back-left view displaying the ponytail, back of the top, and pants, with the arms extended and shoes visible.
description_view_3: Back-right view focusing on the back of the head, ponytail, and the rear of the athletic outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic wear with a sleeveless V-neck top and fitted athletic pants
